title: lastrea indochinensis
intro: Lastrea indochinensis, also known as the Indochinese lastrea, is a type of fern native to Southeast Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds, infections, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Lastrea indochinensis include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and promoting healthy digestion. Traditionally, the plant is used to make herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
